definition:
to crouch down on one's hams, to squat , (Xenophon Historicus): ἐς γόνυ ὀκλάσας δέχεται τῇ σαρίσσῃ τὴν ἐπέλασιν, of a soldier waiting an attack, (Lucian); of a weary traveller, (Sophocles Tragicus):—;with accusative, ὀκλ. τὰ ὀπίσθια, τοὺς προσθίους to bend  their hind or fore legs, (Xenophon Historicus) 
 (ML)
